problems_encountered.description: Tool handler sends projectId as 'undefined' in API URL (v2/projects/undefined/cronjobs), resulting in 403 Forbidden. Handler needs to derive projectId from installationId.

tool_response_summary: 403 Forbidden error due to undefined projectId in API request
execution_notes: The cronjob/create tool has a bug where it doesn't extract projectId from the provided installationId. The API request URL shows 'v2/projects/undefined/cronjobs' instead of the actual project ID. This prevents cronjob creation even with valid parameters.
